# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: microservice-a
spec:
  protocol: http
  port: 8080
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: microservice-a-authorization
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: microservice-a
  rules:
  - from:
      kind: ServiceAccount
      names:
      - sa-microservice-b
      namespace: default
    to:
      kind: ServiceAccount
      names:
      - sa-microservice-a
      namespace: default
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: microservice-b
spec:
  protocol: http
  port: 8080
---
apiVersion: security.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: microservice-b-authorization
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: microservice-b
  rules:
  - from:
      kind: ServiceAccount
      names:
      - sa-microservice-a
      namespace: default
    to:
      kind: ServiceAccount
      names:
      - sa-microservice-b
      namespace: default
